schema.description:
Serializer for executing CSUC Click to Pay payments.

This serializer is used when the user completes the payment flow
and submits their payment method through the Cybersource widget.

pg_code.description: Payment Gateway code selected for Click to Pay.

session_id.description: Session ID used to identify the transaction.

funding_source.description: Payment source containing the transient token from Cybersource. This token is generated by the Cybersource Unified Checkout widget after the user completes payment method selection. Expected structure: {'transient_token': 'jwt_token_string'}

schema.title: CSUCPayment
